title: pimpinella rollae
intro: Pimpinella rollae, also known as Korean coriander, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in East Asia and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its carminative and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Pimpinella rollae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Pimpinella rollae can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
